learning_path.title: Start Here: First-Time Hackathon Pathway
learning_path.summary: A beginner-first, ordered pathway of NovaLXP courses that prepares non-technical learners to complete the Tech Enablement Track over two days.
learning_path.audience: Learners with low technology proficiency who may have never coded, used Cloud Workstations, or worked in Google Cloud.

courses.title: Hackathon Pathway 1 of 4: AI Hackathon Orientation
hackathon_alignment: Supports all agenda items by removing basic computer-use blockers

courses.title: Hackathon Pathway 2 of 4: GCP Cloud Workstations Basics
Hackathon Pathway 4 of 4: Data and Integration Foundations
